Toggle navigation Podosphaera xanthii (PODOXA) Menu Overview → Photos Documents Overview Code created in: 2007-07-19 Basic information EPPO Code: PODOXA Preferred name: Podosphaera xanthii Authority: (Castagne) Braun & Shishkoff Other scientific names Name Authority Oidium citrulli Yen & Wang Sphaerotheca cucurbitae (Jaczewski) Zhao Sphaerotheca fuliginea f. cucurbitae Jaczewski Common names Name Language powdery mildew of cucurbits English Mehltau: Gurke German Mehltau: Kürbisgewächse German oïdium des cucurbitacées French oídio de las cucurbitáceas Spanish stekelnootmeeldauw Dutch more photos... Taxonomy Kingdom Fungi      (
      1FUNGK      ) Phylum Ascomycota      (
      1ASCOP      ) Subphylum Pezizomycotina      (
      1PEZIQ      ) Class Leotiomycetes      (
      1LETOC      ) Order Erysiphales      (
      1ERYSO      ) Family Erysiphaceae      (
      1ERYSF      ) Genus Podosphaera      (
      1PODOG      ) Species Podosphaera xanthii      (
      PODOXA      )

seed.symptoms: White powdery fungal patches on upper and lower leaf surfaces; yellowing and premature senescence of leaves.
seed.causes: Fungus Podosphaera xanthii; unlike most powdery mildews, does NOT require leaf wetness; spread by airborne spores.
seed.treatment: Sulfur, potassium bicarbonate, or triazole fungicides; neem oil as organic option.
seed.prevention: Plant resistant varieties; maintain plant spacing for airflow; avoid excessive nitrogen fertilization.
